title: Spectator Freecam
description: Allows you to freely switch to spectator mode with a command and/or keypress
body:
# Spectator Freecam

Spectator Freecam is a Minecraft mod, with the intent of adding a "Freecam Like" experience, using Spectator mode.

The mod adds a command and a keybind to switch the user into Freecam(Spectator Mode).

The user will be moved back to their original position and gamemode once spectator mode has been disabled.

## Installation
### Server (Required)
Installing this mod on your server will allow anyone to use the `/freecam` command.  

### Client (Optional)
Installing this mod on your client will allow you to bind a key to enable/disable freecam.  
Default key is `F7`
